b'10 += 5:' 15
b'20 -= 8:' 12
b'6 *= 7:' 42
b'100 //= 9:' 11
b'17 %= 5:' 2
b'2 **= 8:' 256
b'12 |= 3:' 15
b'15 &= 9:' 9
b'10 ^= 7:' 13
b'4 <<= 3:' 32
b'64 >>= 2:' 16
b'10.5 += 2.5:' 13.0
b'20.0 -= 5.5:' 14.5
b'3.0 *= 4.0:' 12.0
b'15.0 /= 4.0:' 3.75
b'17.0 //= 5.0:' 3.0
b'10.0 %= 3.0:' 1.0
b'2.0 **= 3.0:' 8.0
b'Sum 0+1+2+3+4:' 10
